'''tashongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynastarter|dynastarter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynastarter|dynastarter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tashongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæshengeth|tæshengeth]] || [[word:tæshengej|tæshengej]] || [[word:tæshengesh|tæshengesh]] || [[word:tæshenge|tæshenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tashoshongoth|tashoshongoth]] || [[word:tashoshongoj|tashoshongoj]] || [[word:tashoshongosh|tashoshongosh]] || [[word:tashoshongo|tashoshongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tashongoth|tashongoth]] || [[word:tashongoj|tashongoj]] || [[word:tashongosh|tashongosh]] || [[word:tashongo|tashongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tashofngoth|tashofngoth]] || [[word:tashofngoj|tashofngoj]] || [[word:tashofngosh|tashofngosh]] || [[word:tashofngof|tashofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tashongotho|tashongotho]] || [[word:tashongojo|tashongojo]] || [[word:tashongosho|tashongosho]] || [[word:tashongoko|tashongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tashongoth|tashongoth]] || [[word:tashongoj|tashongoj]] || [[word:tashongosh|tashongosh]] || [[word:tashongo|tashongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tashongothol|tashongothol]] || [[word:tashongojol|tashongojol]] || [[word:tashongoshol|tashongoshol]] || [[word:tashongokol|tashongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tashongothotho|tashongothotho]] || [[word:tashongojojo|tashongojojo]] || [[word:tashongoshosho|tashongoshosho]] || [[word:tashongoko|tashongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tashongothon|tashongothon]] || [[word:tashongojon|tashongojon]] || [[word:tashongoshon|tashongoshon]] || [[word:tashongokon|tashongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tashongothoro|tashongothoro]] || [[word:tashongojoro|tashongojoro]] || [[word:tashongoshoro|tashongoshoro]] || [[word:tashongokoro|tashongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
